title: 梦江南
author: 温庭筠
content:
千万恨
恨极在天涯
山月不知心里事
水风空落眼前花
摇曳碧云斜
translation:
Ten thousand hates
The hate reaches its limit at the edge of the sky
The mountain moon doesn't know the heart's affairs
The water wind idly drops flowers before my eyes
Swaying, the blue clouds slant
annotation: She hates that he's so far away. The moon doesn't care, the wind just blows flowers around. Everything is beautiful except her heart.

title: 河传
author: 温庭筠
content:
湖上
闲望
雨萧萧
烟浦花桥路遥
谢娘翠蛾愁不销
终朝
梦魂迷晚潮
translation:
On the lake
Idly gazing
Rain, rustling
Mist shore, flower bridge, the road far
Lady Xie's green brows, sorrow never fades
All day
Dream soul lost in the evening tide
annotation: Rain on a lake, a distant bridge, a woman's sorrow that never fades. Her dream soul is lost in the tide — she can't find her way back.

title: 酒泉子
author: 温庭筠
content:
花映柳条
闲向绿萍池上
凭阑干
窥细浪
近来音信两疏索
洞房空寂寞
掩银屏
垂翠箔
度春宵
translation:
Flowers reflect willow branches
Idly facing the green duckweed pool
Leaning on the railing
Peeking at the fine waves
Recently, letters have been sparse and few
The bridal chamber, empty and lonely
Closing the silver screen
Hanging the green foil
Passing the spring night
annotation: Flowers, willows, a pool, a railing. But no letters. The bridal chamber is empty. She passes the spring night alone, counting the hours.

title: 定西番
author: 温庭筠
content:
汉使昔年离别
攀弱柳
折寒梅
上高台
千里玉关春雪
雁来人不来
translation:
The Han envoy parted in years past
Climbing the weak willow
Breaking the cold plum blossom
Ascending the high tower
A thousand miles, Jade Gate's spring snow
The geese come, but the person doesn't come
annotation: She breaks a plum blossom, climbs a tower, looks west. The geese return every spring. He doesn't. The most painful waiting is when nature keeps its promises but people don't.

title: 诉衷情
author: 温庭筠
content:
莺语
花舞
春昼午
雨霏霏
金带枕
宫锦
凤凰帷
柳弱蝶交飞
依依
辽阳音信稀
梦中归
translation:
Orioles sing
Flowers dance
Spring day at noon
Rain, dense and fine
Golden belt pillow
Palace brocade
Phoenix curtains
Willow weak, butterflies cross-flying
Reluctant
Liaoyang letters, rare
In dreams, I return
annotation: Spring is everywhere — singing birds, dancing flowers, butterflies. But his letters are rare. Only in dreams can she go to him.

title: 归国遥
author: 韦庄
content:
春欲暮
满地落花红带雨
惆怅玉笼鹦鹉
单栖无伴侣
南望去程何许
问花花不语
早晚得同归去
恨无双翠羽
translation:
Spring about to end
Ground full of falling flowers, red with rain
Melancholy, a jade-caged parrot
Alone, no companion
Southward I gaze — how far the journey?
I ask the flowers; they don't speak
Sooner or later we'll return together
I hate not having a pair of green wings
annotation: Flowers fall in the rain. A caged parrot has no companion. She asks the flowers when he'll return — they don't answer. If only she had wings.

title: 荷叶杯
author: 韦庄
content:
记得那年花下
深夜
初识谢娘时
水堂西面画帘垂
携手暗相期
惆怅晓莺残月
相别
从此隔音尘
如今俱是异乡人
相见更无因
translation:
I remember that year under the flowers
Deep night
When I first met Lady Xie
West of the water hall, painted curtains hanging
Hand in hand, secretly promising
Melancholy — dawn orioles, setting moon
Parting
Since then, separated by dust and sound
Now we're both strangers in foreign lands
Meeting again — no reason to
annotation: They met under flowers, held hands, promised forever. Then they parted. Now they're both far from home, and meeting again is impossible. The most realistic love poem: sometimes promises don't survive distance.

title: 浣溪沙
author: 韦庄
content:
清晓妆成寒食天
柳球斜袅间花钿
卷帘直出画堂前
指点牡丹初绽朵
日高犹自凭阑干
含颦不语恨春残
translation:
At dawn, makeup done, Cold Food Festival day
Willow balls slanting, dangling among flower hairpins
Rolling up the curtain, straight out before the painted hall
Pointing at the peony's first blooming bud
The sun high, still leaning on the railing
Frowning, not speaking, hating spring's end
annotation: She's dressed beautifully for the festival. But she just points at a flower and leans on the railing. 'Hating spring's end' — she's not mourning the season, she's mourning herself.

title: 谒金门
author: 韦庄
content:
空相忆
无计得传消息
天上嫦娥人不识
寄书何处觅
translation:
Vainly remembering
No way to send news
The Chang'e in heaven — no one knows her
Where to send a letter?
annotation: She wants to send a message but doesn't know where. Even the moon goddess is unreachable. When you can't reach someone, the whole universe feels too big.

title: 江城子
author: 韦庄
content:
恩重娇多情极
漏更难
解相逢
怕人知
羞郎面
整金衣
相见夜阑时
语低眉
translation:
Kindness deep, charm extreme, feelings extreme
The hour late, harder
Understanding the meeting
Afraid people will know
Ashamed before her husband
Adjusting golden clothes
Meeting when the night is late
Speaking low, brows lowered
annotation: A secret meeting late at night. She's afraid, ashamed, adjusting her clothes.韦庄 writes forbidden love with tenderness, not judgment.

title: 天仙子
author: 韦庄
content:
梦觉云屏依旧空
杜鹃声咽隔帘栊
玉郎薄幸去无踪
一日日
恨重重
泪界莲腮两线红
translation:
Waking from dreams, the cloud screen still empty
Cuckoo sounds choked behind the lattice
The jade lord, heartless, left without a trace
Day by day
Hate upon hate
Tear lines on lotus cheeks, two lines of red
annotation: She wakes to an empty room. The cuckoo cries. He's gone without a trace. Day after day, tears on her red cheeks. The most direct expression of abandonment.

title: 木兰花
author: 韦庄
content:
独上小楼春欲暮
愁望玉关芳草路
消息断
不逢人
却敛细眉归绣户
坐看落花空叹息
罗袂湿斑红泪滴
千山万水不曾行
魂梦欲教何处觅
translation:
Alone climbing the small tower, spring about to end
Sorrowfully gazing at the Jade Gate's fragrant grass road
News cut off
Not meeting anyone
She knits her fine brows and returns to the embroidery room
Sitting, watching falling flowers, sighing in vain
Silk sleeves wet with spotted red tears
A thousand mountains and ten thousand waters — she's never traveled them
Her dream soul — where can it find him?
annotation: She's never been to the frontier, but her soul searches for him there.韦庄 writes the geography of longing — distance measured in tears, not miles.

title: 小重山
author: 韦庄
content:
一闭昭阳春又春
夜寒魂梦近
黄昏庭院柳莺啼
忆君迢迢隔青天
昔时横波目
今作流泪泉
translation:
Once sealed, the sunny spring returns again and again
Night cold, dream souls near
Dusk courtyard, willow orioles sing
Remembering you, far, far away, separated by blue sky
Those once horizontal wave eyes
Now become a spring of flowing tears
annotation: Years pass in the palace. Her beautiful eyes, once like waves, now only flow with tears. The most devastating transformation: beauty into grief.

title: 酒泉子
author: 韦庄
content:
月落星沉
楼上美人春睡稳
绿云倾
金枕腻
画屏深
子规啼破相思梦
曙色东方才动
translation:
Moon sets, stars sink
Upstairs, the beauty sleeps soundly in spring
Green clouds (hair) tilted
Golden pillow, smooth
Painted screen, deep
The cuckoo breaks the longing dream
Dawn light in the east just beginning to move
annotation: She sleeps. Her hair spills across the pillow. Then a cuckoo cries and breaks her dream of him. Dawn comes. Another day without him begins.

title: 女冠子
author: 牛峤
content:
绿云高髻
点翠匀红时世
月眉娇
云鬓袅
雪肌香
绣屏掩
枕鸳钗凤
柳暗花明昼永
translation:
Green clouds (hair) in a high bun
Dotted with green, evenly red, fashionable
Moon eyebrows, charming
Cloud temples, graceful
Snow skin, fragrant
Embroidered screen hiding
Pillow with mandarin ducks, phoenix hairpin
Willow dark, flower bright, day long
annotation: A woman described from hair to skin. Everything is beautiful, fashionable, perfect. But the 'long day' hints at boredom beneath the beauty.

title: 感恩多
author: 牛峤
content:
两条红粉泪
多少香闺意
强攀桃李枝
敛愁眉
陌上莺啼蝶舞
柳花飞
柳花飞
愿得郎心
忆家还早归
translation:
Two lines of red powder tears
How much feeling in the fragrant chamber
Forcefully climbing the peach and willow branches
Knitting her brows
On the road, orioles sing, butterflies dance
Willow flowers fly
Willow flowers fly
I wish for your heart
Remember home and return early
annotation: She cries, she waits, she watches butterflies. 'Return early' — the simplest wish, the hardest to grant.

title: 望江怨
author: 牛峤
content:
东风急
惜别花时手频执
罗衣湿
红袂有啼痕
愁无限
消瘦尽
知人否
translation:
East wind urgent
Reluctant to part at flower time, hands frequently held
Silk clothes wet
Red sleeves have tear traces
Sorrow unlimited
Emaciated completely
Do you know?
annotation: They held hands, they parted, she cried. Now she's thin from missing him. 'Do you know?' — the question that every lover asks.

title: 定西番
author: 牛峤
content:
紫塞月明千里
金甲冷
戍楼寒
梦长安
思故园
思故园
两处愁
translation:
Purple frontier, moon bright, a thousand miles
Golden armor cold
Watchtower cold
Dream of Chang'an
Think of the homeland
Think of the homeland
Sorrow in two places
annotation: A soldier on the frontier. His armor is cold, the tower is cold. He dreams of home. 'Sorrow in two places' — he's sad, and so is someone back home.

title: 江城子
author: 牛峤
content:
鵁鶄飞起郡城东
碧江空
半滩风
越王宫殿
蘋叶藕花中
帘卷水楼鱼浪起
千片雪
雨蒙蒙
translation:
Herons fly up east of the prefectural city
Blue river empty
Half the beach wind
The Yue king's palace
In water lettuce leaves and lotus flowers
Curtains roll up on the water tower, fish waves rise
A thousand pieces of snow
Rain, misty and fine
annotation: Herons fly, the river is empty, the old palace is overgrown with lotus. History is just plants now.牛峤 paints the past as a watercolor.

title: 南乡子
author: 李珣
content:
乘彩舫
过莲塘
棹歌惊起睡鸳鸯
游女带香偎伴笑
争窈窕
竞折团荷遮晚照
translation:
Riding a painted boat
Crossing the lotus pond
Oar songs startle sleeping mandarin ducks
Playing girls, carrying fragrance, leaning on companions, laughing
Competing in grace
Rushing to fold round lotus leaves to shade the evening sun
annotation: Girls on a boat, laughing, competing to be the prettiest. They use lotus leaves as sunshades.李珣 captures a perfect summer afternoon.

title: 渔歌子
author: 李珣
content:
楚山青
湘水绿
春风澹荡看不足
草芊芊
花簇簇
渔艇棹歌相续
translation:
Chu mountains green
Xiang water green
Spring wind, gentle and swaying, never enough to see
Grass, lush and thick
Flowers, clustered and dense
Fishing boats, oar songs continuing
annotation: Green mountains, green water, endless spring. Fishing boats sing to each other.李珣 paints Hunan's landscape as a paradise.

title: 西溪子
author: 李珣
content:
金缕翠钿浮动
妆罢小窗圆梦
日高时
春尽也
落花中
translation:
Gold threads, green hairpins, floating and moving
After makeup, small window, fulfilling dreams
When the sun is high
Spring also ends
Among falling flowers
annotation: She puts on makeup, dreams by the window. The sun rises, spring ends, flowers fall. The whole cycle of hope and loss in five lines.

title: 河传
author: 李珣
content:
去去
何处
迢迢巴楚
山水相连
朝云暮雨
依旧暗愁无限
珠泪盈
肠断
translation:
Going, going
Where?
Far, far, Ba and Chu
Mountains and water connected
Morning clouds, evening rain
Still, dark sorrow unlimited
Pearl tears full
Heart broken
annotation: She's going far away, to the land of Ba and Chu. Morning clouds, evening rain — the classic image of separation. Her tears are pearls, her heart is broken.

title: 菩萨蛮
author: 无名氏
content:
牡丹含露真珠颗
美人折向庭前过
含笑问檀郎
花强妾貌强
檀郎故相恼
须道花枝好
一向发娇嗔
碎挼花打人
translation:
Pearl dew on peony petals
A beauty passes by the garden
Smiling, she asks her lover: are the flowers prettier or am I?
Her lover deliberately teases
And says the flower branch is better
She pouts in a tantrum
Crumples the flower and hits him
annotation: The most playful love poem. She asks the dangerous question: am I prettier than the flowers? He says the flowers. She hits him with the flowers. This is love as comedy.

title: 竹枝词
author: 孙光宪
content:
门前春水白蘋花
岸上无人小艇斜
商女经过江欲暮
散抛残食饲神鸦
translation:
Before the gate, spring water, white duckweed flowers
On the shore, no one, a small boat slanting
A merchant woman passes as the river approaches dusk
Scattering leftover food to feed the sacred crows
annotation: A quiet river scene. A boat, a woman, crows at dusk.孙光宪 finds poetry in the most ordinary moment.
